race.description: The Loose Moose Qtis 3yof Maiden Plate
race.comment: QUEEN JEDDAH (9) wasn't disgraced in town when resuming and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and should be right there when the whips are cracking. FLAXLANDS (3) resumes here but brings NSW formlines to the table and should find this assignment more to her liking. Can run a big race while fresh. LADY MILAN (5) strips fitter second-up from the spell and must be respected out of the Gollan barn. Watch for sharp improvement. REGAL RINA (10) is first-up but has tuned up for this with two solid trials and hoop Larson stays on top for race day. Can feature in the finish. PACIERA (8) best of the rest.
